## Outcome / Summary
Describe the *end state* this epic enables (player-visible or engineering/process).

## Why (thesis/process relevance)
- <What development practice does this demonstrate?>
- <How will you reference it in the thesis? e.g., CI discipline, architecture, maintainability>

## Definition of Done (DoD)
- [ ] All Feature sub-issues done and meet their acceptance criteria
- [ ] CI green on default branch
- [ ] Release notes / changelog entry written (if milestone/release)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / ADR) if architecture or workflow changed
